persona_pain: Looking automated or spammy on LinkedIn risks the reputation you spent years building
persona_blurb: You do your own sales. Your name is your brand, and every automated-feeling LinkedIn message risks undoing years of relationship-building. You need outreach that sounds exactly like you — in the signals you'd actually notice, at the volume that feels personal, not like a drip campaign. These plays are designed for founders who want LinkedIn to feel like them, not like an SDR they hired.

recipes.name: Social engagement flow — founder posts
recipes.outcome: Start with the warmest founder motion: ICP-qualify people engaging with your posts, check connection status, and draft a light founder-voice touch for approval. No HubSpot required.
recipes.needs: No HubSpot required; HubSpot optional for CRM context

recipes.name: Founder-led AI SDR — daily approval queue
recipes.outcome: Use a HubSpot contact/company list or discover a new ICP list, enrich each prospect, and draft up to 10/day free or 15/day Sales Nav/Premium founder-voice touches for approval.
recipes.needs: No HubSpot required with ICP brief + FirstTouch Discover Contacts; HubSpot list optional

recipes.name: Fast personal inbound follow-up
recipes.outcome: Connect with high-intent signups and demo requests on LinkedIn same day, in your voice.
recipes.needs: HubSpot or FirstTouch-accessible inbound list/import required

recipes.name: Website visitor play
recipes.outcome: Turn pricing/demo/product-page visits into LinkedIn touches while intent is active.
recipes.needs: HubSpot tracking or RB2B/list source required; otherwise route to Founder AI SDR

recipes.name: Scoop-up slipped leads
recipes.outcome: Use HubSpot lifecycle/deal/list data to find personal lost deals and dormant contacts worth a second look.

recipes.name: Stalled deal reactivation — 60-day open-deal workflow
recipes.outcome: Trigger a contact-based HubSpot workflow when contacts are associated to open deals that are not Closed Won/Lost and have had no engagement for 60+ days, then draft a fresh founder-voice LinkedIn touch for approval.
recipes.needs: HubSpot required; contact-based workflow only, because deal-based triggers are unsupported

recipes.name: Customer thank-you
recipes.outcome: Reach out when a customer hits a milestone, deepen the relationship before you need a favor.
